title: Jdent
compiled_truth: Jdent is an external contact at [Mmcable](companies/mmcable). Over the corpus period (2000-09-13 to 2001-11-05), Jdent sent 20 and received 44 emails, totalling 64 interactions. Top correspondents: [Smu-Betas](people/smu-betas-yahoogroups) (20).
timeline:
